generation_tips.reference_image_strategy: 先用场景 3 或 4 生成风格参考图，后续全部关键帧使用同一参考图
generation_tips.seed_strategy: 平台支持时，同批次使用相同或相近 seed
generation_tips.batch_size: 每次生成 2–4 张候选图并筛选风格最一致的一张
generation_tips.prompt_structure: 固定风格 + 固定角色 + 可变场景 + 固定输出约束

scenes.visual_description: Azhen, a shy young Chinese woman, watches Aqiang from a few steps away beside a quiet old cinema booth at dusk; she holds a small film can close to her chest while he adjusts the wooden door, one clear tender unspoken-love moment, vertical composition, clean upper area, no written text
scenes.notes: 阿帧与阿强均为年轻成年人；画面中禁止任何文字、标志、水印。
scenes.prompt:
Hand-drawn children's book illustration in loose expressive black ink sketch style with delicate cross-hatching shading for volume and texture, simple cute cartoon characters with big eyes and minimal clean details, clean white paper background with subtle ground texture, generous negative space, emotional nostalgic atmosphere, highly consistent character design throughout the entire series.

Art style rules (must follow strictly):
- Loose black ink lines with natural hand-drawn wobble
- Cross-hatching shading on clothes, ground, and objects for depth
- Selective warm color accents only on key elements (avoid flat unshaded colors)
- Soft natural lighting with gentle highlights on surfaces
- Warm heartfelt and nostalgic atmosphere
- In the exact same art style across all images in the series
- Generous negative space, never cluttered composition

Negative prompt: realistic, photorealistic, 3d render, blurry, deformed hands, extra limbs, text in image, watermark, low quality, flat unshaded color, western disney style, heavy anime look, cluttered composition, modern elements, urban setting, neon colors, digital art look

Character consistency rules:
Azhen: a 24-year-old Chinese woman with a short black bob tucked behind one ear, oval face, expressive dark eyes, cream blouse, rust-red cardigan, calf-length navy skirt, simple brown shoes; she carries a small round metal film can. Aqiang: a 26-year-old Chinese man with short slightly tousled black hair, gentle square face, olive-green work jacket over an off-white shirt, dark trousers, brown shoes. Both are young adults. Keep their facial structure, ages, hair, clothes, proportions and the old wooden cinema booth identical in every scene.

Scene description:
Azhen, a shy young Chinese woman, watches Aqiang from a few steps away beside a quiet old cinema booth at dusk; she holds a small film can close to her chest while he adjusts the wooden door, one clear tender unspoken-love moment, vertical composition, clean upper area, no written text

Output constraints:
- Portrait orientation, consistent framing and visual language across the series
- Keep a clean area for later subtitle compositing
- Do not render captions, letters, logos, signatures, or watermarks inside the image

scenes.visual_description: Azhen and Aqiang stand outside the tiny old cinema booth beneath a deep cloud-covered night sky with no visible stars; Azhen looks upward anxiously and Aqiang waits quietly, a small town lane fading into generous paper space, one readable beat, no written text
scenes.on_screen_text: 可那晚，天空没有一颗星星
scenes.notes: 天空必须无星；气氛失落但温柔；禁止画内文字。

scenes.visual_description: Inside the old wooden cinema booth at night, the single hanging bulb has just gone dark; Azhen and Aqiang appear as soft silhouettes, Azhen lowers her head while holding a round film can, faint cool window light outlines their faces, child-friendly emotional clarity, no written text
scenes.on_screen_text: 连小镇的灯，也忽然熄灭了
scenes.notes: 停电场景仍需看清人物轮廓；不要恐怖感；禁止画内文字。

scenes.visual_description: Close intimate view of Azhen at a small wooden table, cutting tiny star-shaped openings from an old strip of photographic film while Aqiang watches with gentle surprise; a small battery lantern casts amber light over scissors, film curls and careful hands, single inventive action, no written text
scenes.on_screen_text: 阿帧把旧胶片，剪成了星星
scenes.notes: 本场作为风格参考图；手部结构自然；胶片上不可出现字母数字。

scenes.visual_description: Azhen lifts a small warm lantern behind star-cut film attached to the cinema booth window; dozens of soft golden star-shaped light spots scatter across the warm paper wall and over Aqiang's amazed face, dark blue night around them, magical yet handmade, no written text
scenes.on_screen_text: 光穿过去，满墙亮起了星光
key_actions: 阿帧举灯照亮星形胶片
scenes.notes: 星光必须明显来自灯与胶片投影，不是真实夜空；禁止画内文字。

scenes.visual_description: Aqiang silently lights a second small lantern behind another piece of star-cut film; two fields of warm projected stars meet on the wall as Azhen and Aqiang's soft shadows lean gently toward each other, quiet old cinema booth, tender earned ending, generous negative space, no written text
scenes.on_screen_text: 阿强点亮另一盏灯，让两片星空相遇
scenes.notes: 以影子靠近表达回应，不要夸张亲密动作；禁止画内文字。
